title: Clear Glass Mason Santa Shaped Christmas Drinking Jar With Lid And Straw - Design Varies
features: Christmas is a time for celebration and sharing. Why not share a drink and a toast in a suitably festive way with this jolly Santa shaped drinking jar complete with straw and lid
Perfect for entertaining guests at Christmas parties and festivities
Ideal for whatever drinks you like, alcoholic or non alcoholic - bottoms up!
Design varies - one jar will be chosen at random and sent
description: A delightfully festive way to serve your Christmas drinks. This Santa shaped drinking jar will surely bring a smile to your guests faces this Christmas. Simply fill with whatever drink you fancy, gin and tonic, eggnog, Christmas punch or any soft drink.
